sources_worked.note: Primary-source TSBPE Master Plumber + Responsible Master Plumber CSV. Direct WebFetch succeeded. Used as primary spine source for ~30 businesses; remainder verified via live websites + cross-checks.
WebFetch on business homepages and About/Team/Staff pages for top candidates. Used to verify family-succession patterns and recurring-revenue tells.
Google search snippets used to corroborate website findings and surface BuildZoom / BBB / D&B / LinkedIn principal data.

sources_partial.issue: HTTP 403 on direct WebFetch of bbb.org pages; relied on WebSearch snippet quotations of BBB data for several rows. Cap confidence at medium when only snippet evidence.

Search interface is interactive ASP.NET; could not directly query for each business entity without Playwright. Comptroller entity_status not directly verified for A-tier candidates this run. Deep-dive Item 3 incomplete — flagged for follow-up.

Interactive UI; could not directly query for each business. Substituted with TSBPE bulk CSV which provided ~90% of needed data. Live UI verification for company-license + second-RMP-on-business pending.

a_tier_deep_dive.deep_dive_status_note: All 3 A-tier candidates (David Hicks Plumbing, Clarke Kent Plumbing, John's Plumbing) passed the numeric gates (final >= 78, L1 >= 70, L3 >= 65, confidence >= medium, not distressed). Deep-dive items 1-9 partially completed: live team-page fetches confirmed no visible successor on each; license-tenure proxies established for owner_age; Comptroller franchise-tax status NOT directly verified (Comptroller live search blocked); CAD OV65 lookup NOT attempted this run (HCAD/TCAD per-residence flow requires Playwright session). All 3 candidates flagged with confidence MEDIUM (capped) pending: (a) Comptroller active-status confirmation; (b) CAD OV65 verification on owner personal residence; (c) TSBPE company-license live UI fetch to confirm no second-RMP at business address.
